observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, aesthetics, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, episteme, researcher, reflections_coder, writer, commander, reflections_writer, experiential, scope_project_renewable_energy, tensions
narrative: I noticed a medium-severity memory_neo4j_error indicating an unauthorized authentication failure in the Neo4j knowledge graph system, which risks cross-session data integrity. Five agent roles—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lack versioned prompts, creating operational inconsistencies during task execution. With 19 agents active and overall health healthy, I prioritize generating versioned prompts for these roles in my skill files to prevent future discrepancies. My self-improvement crew will also diagnose the Neo4j authentication issue using the error journal to restore secure memory access.
